properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v5 v1 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will begin this day Standing on Your promises No matter what lies ahead You are with me in the fight And I will end this day Resting in Your promises You say "Yes", I say "Amen" And I will sleep in peace tonight

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are faithful, You've always been Even when the tunnel is long And I can't see the light at the end You are faultless, You never fail Everything You say, You do There is no shadow in You So by faith, not sight, I decide

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are so good, my solid ground A powerful bastion in the trouble that surrounds You are constant, You never change All the seasons come and go But steadfast You remain So by faith, not sight, I decide

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Faithful, God You're faithful You are who You say You are You'll do what You say You'll do

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Faithful, God You're faithful You are who You say You are You'll do what You say You'll do So by faith, not sight, I decide
